title: Far Distance
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Far Distance''' was the area on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] where clients were bonded with their prospective [[Sekotan Personal Starship|seed-ships]]. The [[Northern Sea (Zonama Sekot)|Northern Sea]] was located there. After [[Nom Anor]] attacked Sekot with a biological weapon in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]], areas of the Far Distance melted and became islands.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1st|in book}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
